meaning: adj.未受指导的,无收件人姓名的
examples: The other part of the project is an undirected search which is monitoring all of space with a lower sensitivity, using the smaller antennas of NASA's Deep Space Network.
Four participants in the "undirected prayer" group had, without prompting, decided to pray for their romantic partners on a daily basis.
They are the result of undirected tinkering narrated after the fact, when it is dressed up as controlled research.
American undirected free-enterprise works because it aggressively allows us to capture the randomness of the environment--the cheap Black Swans.
